---
title: "Academic Journey"
format: html
toc: false
---

[Placeholder: Timeline] \

[Map] V4 \

## Places That Shaped My Academic and Professional Path

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| toc: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(htmlwidgets)

places <- data.frame(
  name = c(
    # Education
    "Mediterranean Agronomic Institute of Chania",
    "Agrocampus Ouest Rennes-Angers",
    "Higher Institute of Agronomic Sciences of Chott Mariem",
    "Bizerte Preparatory Engineering Institute",

    # Research
    "Plant Molecular Biology and Biotechnology Laboratory, MAICh",
    "Horticultural Science Laboratory, National Agronomic Institute of Tunisia",

    # Industry
    "Azib Flower",
    "Bioverte",
    "Sanlucar"
  ),

  role = c(
    # Education
    "MSc in Horticultural Genetics and Biotechnology",
    "Erasmus Exchange Program",
    "Agronomy Engineering",
    "Pre-Engineering courses in Biology-Geology",

    # Research
    "Functional Characterization of 7 Local Greek Tomato Cultivars in Ripening",
    "Optimization of Tissue Culture Protocol for Rosa centifolia",

    # Industry
    "Internship: ornamental greenhouse operations and Integrated Pest Management",
    "Internship: sustainable beekeeping, hive management, and honey extraction",
    "Internship: hydroponic red berry production"
  ),

  category = c(
    "Education", "Education", "Education", "Education",
    "Research", "Research",
    "Industry", "Industry", "Industry"
  ),

  location = c(
    "Chania, Greece",
    "Angers, France",
    "Sousse / Chott Mariem, Tunisia",
    "Bizerte, Tunisia",
    "Chania, Greece",
    "Tunis, Tunisia",
    "Bizerte, Tunisia",
    "Bizerte, Tunisia",
    "Bizerte, Tunisia"
  ),

  years = c(
    "2024 - Present",
    "2021 - 2022",
    "2019 - 2022",
    "2017 - 2019",
    "Oct 2025 - Present",
    "Jun 2022 - Dec 2022",
    "Jun 2021",
    "Jul 2021",
    "Aug 2020"
  ),

  country = c(
    "Greece", "France", "Tunisia", "Tunisia",
    "Greece", "Tunisia", "Tunisia", "Tunisia", "Tunisia"
  ),

  place_group = c(
    "Chania",
    "Angers",
    "Sousse / Chott Mariem",
    "Bizerte",
    "Chania",
    "Tunis",
    "Bizerte",
    "Bizerte",
    "Bizerte"
  ),

  base_lat = c(
    35.5138,  # Chania
    47.4784,  # Angers
    35.9230,  # Sousse / Chott Mariem
    37.2744,  # Bizerte
    35.5138,  # Chania
    36.8189,  # Tunis
    37.2744,  # Bizerte
    37.2744,  # Bizerte
    37.2744   # Bizerte
  ),

  base_lng = c(
    24.0180,  # Chania
    -0.5632, # Angers
    10.5600, # Sousse / Chott Mariem
    9.8739,  # Bizerte
    24.0180, # Chania
    10.1658, # Tunis
    9.8739,  # Bizerte
    9.8739,  # Bizerte
    9.8739   # Bizerte
  )
)

# Category colors
col_education <- "#66c5cc"
col_research  <- "#f89c74"
col_industry  <- "#f6cf71"

places$marker_color <- ifelse(
  places$category == "Education", col_education,
  ifelse(places$category == "Research", col_research, col_industry)
)

places$marker_radius <- ifelse(
  places$category == "Education", 7.5,
  ifelse(places$category == "Research", 6.5, 5.8)
)

places$marker_weight <- ifelse(
  places$category == "Education", 2.7,
  ifelse(places$category == "Research", 2.3, 2)
)

places$marker_opacity <- ifelse(
  places$category == "Education", 0.96,
  ifelse(places$category == "Research", 0.88, 0.84)
)

places$popup <- paste0(
  "<strong>", places$name, "</strong><br>",
  "<em>", places$category, "</em><br>",
  places$role, "<br>",
  places$location, "<br>",
  places$years
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Radial display coordinates for overlapping places
# ---------------------------------------------------------

places$lat <- places$base_lat
places$lng <- places$base_lng

# Smaller than before, so points stay closer to the real coordinates.
offset_distance <- 0.11

for (grp in unique(places$place_group)) {
  idx <- which(places$place_group == grp)
  n <- length(idx)

  if (n > 1) {
    angles <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = n + 1)[-1]

    if (grp == "Chania") {
      angles <- angles + pi / 4
    }

    if (grp == "Bizerte") {
      angles <- angles + pi / 6
    }

    places$lat[idx] <- places$base_lat[idx] + offset_distance * sin(angles)
    places$lng[idx] <- places$base_lng[idx] + offset_distance * cos(angles)
  }
}

# Draw lower-priority categories first.
places$priority <- ifelse(
  places$category == "Industry", 1,
  ifelse(places$category == "Research", 2, 3)
)

places <- places[order(places$priority), ]

world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
study_countries <- world[world$admin %in% unique(places$country), ]

leaflet(
  options = leafletOptions(
    zoomControl = TRUE,
    attributionControl = FALSE
  )
) |>
  addPolygons(
    data = world,
    color = "#b8b8b8",
    weight = 0.6,
    fillColor = "white",
    fillOpacity = 1,
    opacity = 1
  ) |>
  addPolygons(
    data = study_countries,
    layerId = ~paste0("study-", admin),
    color = "#777777",
    weight = 1.1,
    fillColor = "#d9d9d9",
    fillOpacity = 0.10,
    opacity = 1,
    label = ~paste0("Click to highlight ", admin),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(
      weight = 2.2,
      color = "#555555",
      fillColor = "#c7c7c7",
      fillOpacity = 0.35,
      bringToFront = FALSE
    )
  ) |>

  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(places, category == "Industry"),
    lng = ~lng,
    lat = ~lat,
    radius = ~marker_radius,
    color = col_industry,
    weight = ~marker_weight,
    fillColor = col_industry,
    fillOpacity = ~marker_opacity,
    opacity = 1,
    popup = ~popup,
    label = ~name,
    group = "Industry"
  ) |>

  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(places, category == "Research"),
    lng = ~lng,
    lat = ~lat,
    radius = ~marker_radius,
    color = col_research,
    weight = ~marker_weight,
    fillColor = col_research,
    fillOpacity = ~marker_opacity,
    opacity = 1,
    popup = ~popup,
    label = ~name,
    group = "Research"
  ) |>

  addCircleMarkers(
    data = subset(places, category == "Education"),
    lng = ~lng,
    lat = ~lat,
    radius = ~marker_radius,
    color = col_education,
    weight = ~marker_weight,
    fillColor = col_education,
    fillOpacity = ~marker_opacity,
    opacity = 1,
    popup = ~popup,
    label = ~name,
    group = "Education"
  ) |>

  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors = c(col_education, col_research, col_industry),
    labels = c("Education", "Research", "Industry"),
    opacity = 1
  ) |>

  fitBounds(
    lng1 = min(places$lng) - 8,
    lat1 = min(places$lat) - 4,
    lng2 = max(places$lng) + 8,
    lat2 = max(places$lat) + 4
  ) |>

  onRender(
    "
    function(el, x) {
      var map = this;
      var studyLayers = [];

      function resetStudyCountries() {
        studyLayers.forEach(function(layer) {
          layer.setStyle({
            color: '#777777',
            weight: 1.1,
            fillColor: '#d9d9d9',
            fillOpacity: 0.10,
            opacity: 1
          });
        });
      }

      map.eachLayer(function(layer) {
        if (
          layer.options &&
          layer.options.layerId &&
          layer.options.layerId.startsWith('study-')
        ) {
          studyLayers.push(layer);

          layer.on('click', function() {
            resetStudyCountries();

            layer.setStyle({
              color: '#555555',
              weight: 2.4,
              fillColor: '#c7c7c7',
              fillOpacity: 0.42,
              opacity: 1
            });
          });
        }
      });
    }
    "
  )
```
